title: Array Length
subtitle: The number of elements
goal: Learn to determine the number of elements in an array using the length property.
explanation: Every array has a length property.
It shows the number of elements in the array.
length updates automatically when the array changes.
This property is used very often in loops.
length lets you quickly find the size of an array.

analogy.title: Analogy
analogy.text: If a box contains apples, you do not need to count them manually every time—length already knows how many there are.

remember: length shows the number of elements.

mistake.title: Common mistake
mistake.text: Beginners confuse the last index with length. If length is 3, the last index is 2.
